class.name: ASCooldownData
class.brief_description: Stores cooldown information for abilities and tags.
class.description:
ASCooldownData manages cooldown timing and associated tags for abilities or game mechanics that require time-based restrictions.
Used by ASComponent to track active cooldowns and prevent premature reuse. Supports both single ability cooldowns and group cooldowns through associated tags.

method.name: is_expired
method.description: Returns true if the cooldown has expired (remaining ≤ 0.0).

method.name: update
method.description: Updates the remaining cooldown time by subtracting delta time. Clamps to minimum 0.0 to prevent negative values.

method.name: to_dict
method.description: Converts cooldown data to a Dictionary for serialization.

method.name: from_dict
method.description: Loads cooldown data from a Dictionary created by to_dict().

members.member: Remaining time in seconds before cooldown expires.
Array of tags affected by this cooldown for group cooldown management.
